name: AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02)
description: Entry-level AWS certification covering cloud concepts, core AWS services, security, and pricing.
target_job_titles: AI and Machine Learning Software Developer

name: AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA-C03)
description: Covers designing scalable, resilient, and cost-optimized architectures on AWS.
prerequisites: AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) or equivalent experience

name: AWS Developer Associate (DVA-C02)
description: Validates proficiency in developing and maintaining AWS-based applications.
prerequisites: AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) or professional experience

name: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
description: Foundation-level Microsoft Azure certification covering cloud concepts and core Azure services.
renewal_cost_note: Free annual renewal via Microsoft Learn assessment

name: Google Associate Cloud Engineer
description: Validates ability to deploy and manage Google Cloud applications and infrastructure.
passing_score_note: Approximate — Google does not publish exact passing score
next_certs: Google Cloud Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer

name: CompTIA Network+ (N10-009)
description: Validates foundational networking skills across infrastructure and protocols.

name: AWS DevOps Engineer Professional (DOP-C02)
description: Validates technical expertise in provisioning, operating, and managing distributed application systems on AWS.
prerequisites: AWS Developer Associate (DVA-C02) or AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA-C03)

name: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
description: Validates skills, knowledge, and competency to perform the responsibilities of Kubernetes administrators.
exam_format: Performance-based, hands-on tasks in a live Kubernetes environment, ~17 tasks

name: HashiCorp Terraform Associate (003)
description: Validates foundational knowledge of infrastructure as code concepts and the Terraform ecosystem.

name: AWS SysOps Administrator Associate (SOA-C02)
description: Validates ability to deploy, manage, and operate scalable, reliable, and secure infrastructure on AWS.

name: AWS Solutions Architect Professional (SAP-C02)
description: Advanced certification validating ability to design and deploy dynamically scalable, highly available, fault-tolerant, and reliable applications on AWS.
prerequisites: AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA-C03) or equivalent experience

name: AWS Advanced Networking Specialty (ANS-C01)
description: Validates advanced expertise in implementing and managing AWS networking solutions, including hybrid connectivity and advanced routing.

name: AWS SAP on AWS Specialty (PAS-C01)
description: Validates expertise in designing, deploying, and managing SAP applications and workloads on AWS infrastructure.

name: Google Cloud Digital Leader
description: Entry-level certification covering cloud computing fundamentals and Google Cloud's business solutions.
passing_score_note: Approximate — Google does not publish exact passing score

name: Generative AI Leader
description: Foundational certification covering generative AI concepts, capabilities, and Google Cloud's generative AI solutions.

name: Associate Cloud Engineer
description: Mid-level certification validating ability to deploy and manage Google Cloud applications and infrastructure.

name: Google Workspace Administrator (Associate)
description: Certification validating ability to administer and manage Google Workspace for organizations.

name: Professional Cloud Architect
description: Advanced certification validating ability to design, build, and manage cloud solutions on Google Cloud.
prerequisites: Associate Cloud Engineer or equivalent experience

name: Professional Cloud Developer
description: Certification validating ability to build cloud-native applications using Google Cloud services.

name: Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Advanced certification validating expertise in deploying, monitoring, and managing Google Cloud infrastructure.
prerequisites: Associate Cloud Engineer or equivalent experience

name: Professional Cloud Network Engineer
description: Advanced certification validating expertise in designing and managing complex network architectures on Google Cloud.

name: Professional Cloud Database Engineer
description: Advanced certification validating ability to design, implement, and manage database solutions on Google Cloud.

name: Google Workspace Administrator (Professional)
description: Advanced certification validating expertise in managing and deploying Google Workspace at enterprise scale.
prerequisites: Google Workspace Administrator (Associate) or equivalent experience

name: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104)
description: Validates expertise in managing Azure subscriptions, identities, storage, compute, virtual networks, and monitoring. The most hired-against Azure certification on the market.
exam_format: Multiple choice, case studies & labs, 40–60 questions
renewal_cost_note: Free annual renewal via Microsoft Learn assessment

name: Azure Developer Associate (AZ-204)
description: Validates skills in building, deploying, and maintaining Azure-hosted applications including Azure Functions, App Service, Storage, API Management, and monitoring solutions.
exam_format: Multiple choice, case studies & labs, 40–60 questions
renewal_cost_note: Free annual renewal via Microsoft Learn assessment

name: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)
description: Validates advanced skills in designing secure, scalable, and reliable Azure solutions. Covers compute, storage, networking, identity, governance, and monitoring architecture.
exam_format: Multiple choice, case studies & labs, 40–60 questions
renewal_cost_note: Free annual renewal via Microsoft Learn assessment

name: Azure DevOps Engineer Expert (AZ-400)
description: Validates expertise in designing and implementing DevOps practices using Azure DevOps and GitHub, covering CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, monitoring, and security.
exam_format: Multiple choice, case studies & labs, 40–60 questions
renewal_cost_note: Free annual renewal via Microsoft Learn assessment
prerequisites: Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104) OR Azure Developer Associate (AZ-204)
